summary: Step 7 Reference Integrity Hardening + Compliance Page Restructure testing completed. All 29 backend tests passed. Verified 3-layer reference truth model (declared_referee, response, comparison), reference lifecycle states, compliance-structured endpoint with 7 sections, and request-missing-items functionality.
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) with 2 declared references for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 7 Reference Integrity Hardening fully tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/references/{employee_id}/{ref_num}/integrity returns 3-layer truth model (declared_referee, response, comparison), (2) References without independent response have counts_toward_readiness=false, (3) Candidate-upload-only references have 'candidate_upload_only' mismatch flag, (4) POST /api/references/{employee_id}/{ref_num}/override-mismatch requires 20+ char reason, (5) POST /api/references/{employee_id}/{ref_num}/reject marks reference as rejected, (6) GET /api/employees/{employee_id}/references-integrity shows both references and valid_count, (7) GET /api/employees/{employee_id}/compliance-structured returns 7 sections (work_readiness_summary, identity_legal, address_verification, recruitment_integrity, health_forms, training, request_trail), (8) address_verification section shows verified_count=0 and minimum_required=2, (9) recruitment_integrity section shows reference lifecycle and identity_confidence, (10) POST /api/employees/{employee_id}/request-missing-items creates requests for missing items, (11) Reference verification.status shows lifecycle states (not_started, declared, request_sent, awaiting_review, awaiting_verification, verified, rejected).

3_layer_truth_model.details: GET /api/references/{employee_id}/{ref_num}/integrity returns declared_referee, response, comparison layers

counts_toward_readiness_false_without_re.details: References without independent response (submitted_at=null) have counts_toward_readiness=false

identity_confidence_values.details: identity_confidence is one of: match, partial_match, mismatch, review_required

references_integrity_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{employee_id}/references-integrity shows both references, valid_count, minimum_required=2

address_verification_minimum_2.details: address_verification section shows verified_count=0, minimum_required=2, meets_minimum=false

recruitment_integrity_lifecycle.details: recruitment_integrity section shows reference lifecycle and identity_confidence for each reference

request_missing_items.details: POST /api/employees/{employee_id}/request-missing-items creates requests for missing items

verification_status_lifecycle.details: verification.status shows lifecycle states: not_started, declared, request_sent, awaiting_review, awaiting_verification, verified, rejected
